description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Introduces output color(s) [3] and removes input color(s) [2, 4]. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select.
arcDslCode:

from constants import *

    x3 = astuple(SIX, FIVE)
    x4 = ofcolor(x1, TWO)
    x5 = ofcolor(x2, TWO)
    x6 = combine(x4, x5)
    x7 = intersection(x4, x5)
    x8 = difference(x6, x7)
    x9 = canvas(ZERO, x3)
    O = fill(x9, THREE, x8)
    return O
